title: Lead SEO Specialist at Treebo Hotels Global Group

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Treebo Hotels Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the Treebo Hotels Global Group family as a SEO Specialist in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Treebo Hotels Global Group:
Treebo Hotels Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels Global Group!
